A2#22_run_pysr_fe_delegation.notes: Single-target frames now delegate to bruteforce.run_pysr_feature_engineering with translated kwargs. Multi-target frames keep legacy in-place path with explicit migration deprecation warning. Two-test sensor verifies both branches.

A2#20_composite_transforms_per_family_un.notes: Parametrised contract suite across all 24 registered Transform entries (96 tests = 4 contracts x 24 transforms): fit returns JSON-serialisable dict, forward/inverse round-trip identity within transform-specific tolerance, domain_check rejects non-finite y/base, fit does not mutate inputs.

A2_W2_tvt_round5_weak_asserts.notes: Strengthened 4 'is not None' module-existence assertions to callable-phase-entry checks (run_composite_post_processing / run_composite_target_discovery / _tiny_model_rerank). Drained remaining W2 cluster items previously deferred by W11D as 'belongs in dedicated test-strengthening wave'.

A2_W5_mlp_divergence_W7_automl_W4_clone_.notes: Already closed by W11C 2c97919d per FINAL_VERIFICATION baseline. No additional work needed.

B2_7_xfail_owner_reason.notes: All 12 xfail call sites have explicit reason strings: test_custom_estimators.py (Averager classifier check_estimator), test_biz_val_row_attention (multi-head subspace MI), test_bizvalue_outliers_earlystop (soft synthetic-seed sensors x2), test_bizvalue_imbalance_grid (delta_recall floor), test_perf_regression (GPU mi_direct parity), test_integration (LightAutoML numpy 2.0 incompat), test_fuzz_suite + test_fuzz_3way_suite (canon rules add_marker). No anonymous xfails. Same finding closed in w3c as DONE-CONFIRMED-CLEAN; re-verified.

B2_20_44_instafail_addopts.notes: Added --instafail to [tool.pytest.ini_options].addopts so xdist worker-death does not swallow tracebacks. pytest_instafail 0.5.0 already installed via dev extras.

B2_26_redundant_fixtures.reason: Broad refactor; 60+ test files re-roll synthetic data with own np.random.default_rng + pd.DataFrame, only 2 import make_simple_* builders. Centralizing requires per-file refactor of asserts that match seed-specific values. Recommend dedicated wave that adds fast_subset-aware fixture wrappers.

B2_33_coverage_file_lock_windows.notes: pyproject.toml addopts pins --no-cov globally; CI uses --cov only on Linux job; pre-commit hook for test_meta uses --no-cov. No drift from feedback_pytest_no_cov rule.

D2_4_dead_markers.notes: Dropped truly-dead markers: fast_only (0 usage, only mentioned in pyproject), requires_lgb (0 usage). Kept markers referenced as CI filter terms even with 0 in-test usage: multigpu, linux_only, numba_disabled (referenced by .github/workflows/ci.yml, numba-coverage.yml, run_numba_coverage.{sh,ps1}). Docstring + comment references to 'fast_only' updated to match.

B2_37_pno_randomly_local_vs_ci.reason: Local/CI mismatch is intentional per W11D rationale: CI pins -p no:randomly to keep reproducibility on shared runners; local pytest-randomly catches order-dependent failures CI hides. Documentation gap remains; flagged for CLAUDE.md update.

B2_38_suppress_convergence_warnings_auto.reason: Removing autouse breaks current contract (suite assumes no convergence noise). Migration to opt-in fixture requires audit of every test importing pytest.warns(ConvergenceWarning); deferred to dedicated wave.

B2_39_pytest_plugins_at_root.reason: Cosmetic ~50ms startup cost; not in critical path.

B2_40_coverage_active_dead_code_windows.reason: Documentation gap; track for CLAUDE.md coverage strategy section.

B2_42_thinc_seed_overflow_shim.reason: Workaround for upstream thinc bug; no upstream fix landed yet.

B1_weak_assert_W4_W8_residue.notes: W11C 2c97919d already strengthened W4 + W5 + W7. W2 strengthened here. W3 (hermite quantitative floor) remains DEFERRED per directional nature; W11B cd6669a6 added skipif under NUMBA_DISABLE_JIT=1. W6 already closed W10C.

flat_torch_module_missing_imports.notes: Restored os + ModelCheckpoint imports dropped by W10E flat.py monolith carve. on_train_end() was NameError-ing at runtime because the imports lived on parent flat.py only. Per CLAUDE.md 'Monolith split: AST-audit sibling for unresolved names' rule. Regression sensor pins the two names so future carves catch the drift.

tvt_round5_lag_predict_failsafe_default_.notes: Test asserted 0.50 default but src changed to 0.10 on 2026-05-25 (group-aware _carve_inner_eval_split removed the within-group leakage that the original 0.50 tolerance absorbed). Test renamed + reason docstring updated.

api_stability_snapshot_refresh_post_w10e.notes: get_training_configs + select_target moved to siblings via W10E carves; CUDA_IS_AVAILABLE / LGB_GPU_AVAILABLE etc. became public via W11B underscore drain. Snapshot refreshed; same names, new module attribute.

logger_lazy_format_baseline_refresh.notes: Net 2 sites drained (more fixed than added) since prior baseline via W10E + W11A carves; new eager calls use dynamic ndigits format specs that cannot lazy-format efficiently. Refreshed to lock current set; future eager additions still fail the test.

bare_pickle_load_whitelist_line_bump.notes: Whitelisted line for predict.py drifted 685 -> 696 after sibling-module reshuffle. Bumped. (Test would benefit from a sentinel-comment match rather than line number; flagged for follow-up.)

import_cycle_whitelist_extractors_split.notes: W10E extractors.py carved SimpleFeaturesAndTargetsExtractor to _extractors_simple.py; sibling inherits FeaturesAndTargetsExtractor from parent (must be top-level for class-def time). Benign at runtime because parent finishes binding before sibling import; whitelisted.

debt_baseline_refresh_for_cycle_whitelis.notes: _USER_DEFERRED_CYCLES grew 8 -> 9 (extractors split addition); debt baseline tracks growth as expected.

verified_already_fixed: B2#6 fast marker registered - W11C 9eed7acb extended to bootstrap suite
B2#7 xfail audit - w3c CONFIRMED-CLEAN, re-verified

red_paths_pre_existing_outside_scope: tests/test_meta/test_public_annotations.py::test_no_new_unannotated_public_functions (annotation baseline drift from W10E/W11A carves; refresh script exists)
